url.description: Source URL for the event (kurims news entry, arXiv abstract page, conference program page, etc.) — added at v0.5.2 to prevent fabrication-class drift surfaced by round-6 audit. v0.7.13: format=uri + http(s) pattern enforce non-injectable scheme (closes Round 10 critic CRITICAL: javascript:/data:/file: were silently accepted).

archive_url.description: Wayback Machine (or other archival) snapshot URL for the primary `url`. Particularly important for events pinned to volatile index pages such as `kurims.kyoto-u.ac.jp/~motizuki/news-english.html` whose entries rotate over time.
